title: Lab Software Ecosystem
description: A full-stack research lab management platform built with Next.js and AWS Amplify Gen 2. Consolidates team file storage and communication into one interface â€” administrators invite and remove team members via Amazon Cognito, files are managed in S3, and real-time data flows through a GraphQL API backed by AWS AppSync and DynamoDB.
shortDescription: Next.js + AWS Amplify platform for research lab file management and team communication.
